summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing of Firebase Firestore migration. All API endpoints working correctly after fixing Firestore composite index issue.

resolved_issues.issue: Firestore composite index required for compound queries (is_active + ordering)
resolved_issues.fix_applied: Modified query strategy to filter and sort in Python instead of Firestore

passed_tests: Health check API returns Firebase Firestore as database
Individual user registration creates verification code

Events API - CREATE auth protection working
